# Weekly review — 2026-W18

- Your primary goal — lean cut — frames how this week's evidence reads.
- This review is grounded in plan evidence from the canonical (non-superseded) version of each day.

## Recovery

- You received 1 recovery recommendation on April 27.
- On April 27 the recovery recommendation was "easy recovery" at high confidence.

## Data quality

- Of 5 sync runs this week, 3 ran for the same day they covered, 1 pulled data older than 48 hours from upstream (stale-pull lane), 1 were manual backfill entries, and 0 could not be classified.

## Cadence

- You ran `hai daily` on 1 of 7 days this week.

## Notes
